projects.name: AI SOC2 Compliance Agent
projects.description: Open-source Vanta/Drata alternative — automate SOC2 evidence collection, control mapping, and audit preparation. Track Trust Services Criteria controls, collect evidence, manage audits, and maintain security policies.
agents_list: Control Mapper — Maps SOC2 TSC criteria to your organization controls
Evidence Collector — Automated evidence gathering from integrations
Audit Manager — Tracks audit progress and manages auditor engagement
Policy Generator — Creates and maintains security policies
Integration Hub — Connects to AWS, GCP, GitHub, Okta, and 300+ tools

projects.name: AI Competitive Intelligence Agent
projects.description: Open-source Crayon/Klue alternative — monitor competitor signals 24/7, auto-generate battlecards with AI, and build competitive briefings. Track website changes, pricing updates, job postings, reviews, and social mentions across all your competitors.
agents_list: Signal Detector — Scans competitor websites, pricing pages, job boards, reviews, and social media
Battlecard Generator — Analyzes signals and auto-generates battlecards with strengths, weaknesses, win strategies
Briefing Builder — Compiles daily/weekly competitive intelligence digests
Background Worker — Continuous scanning with configurable intervals

projects.name: Healthcare Prior Auth
projects.description: Automate prior authorization workflows — extract patient data from EHR systems, check insurer requirements, flag denial risks, and generate complete submission packages. Built as a 4-agent multi-agent system using LangGraph.
agents_list: Auth Intake Agent — Extracts patient data from EHR/HL7 FHIR feeds
Requirement Checker — Validates insurer-specific criteria and coverage rules
Denial Risk Scorer — Flags high-risk submissions before they get rejected
Documentation Generator — Assembles complete prior auth submission packages

projects.name: Real Estate Lead Gen
projects.description: AI-powered lead generation team — scouts markets, qualifies leads from expired listings and pre-foreclosures, scores prospects using smart criteria, and generates personalized outreach campaigns. Multi-agent system built with LangGraph.
agents_list: Prospecting Agent — Scans expired listings, pre-foreclosures, and off-market signals
Lead Qualifier — Filters and scores leads based on customizable criteria
Outreach Drafter — Generates personalized email/call scripts per lead
Pipeline Tracker — Tracks lead status and follow-up schedules

projects.name: E-Commerce Product Optimizer
projects.description: Automate product listing optimization for e-commerce stores with AI-powered SEO, competitive pricing, review management, and conversion optimization. 4-agent multi-agent system that handles the full product lifecycle.
agents_list: Product Analyzer — Evaluates listing quality and competitor positioning
Content Optimizer — Rewrites titles, descriptions, and keywords for SEO
Pricing Agent — Monitors competitor pricing and recommends optimal prices
Review Manager — Tracks reviews, flags negatives, suggests responses

projects.name: Legal Contract Review
projects.description: Parse contracts, identify redlines and risky clauses, assess risk exposure, generate negotiation summaries, and ensure GDPR/SOC2 compliance. Multi-agent system for legal teams.
agents_list: Contract Parser — Extracts clauses, terms, and obligations from contracts
Risk Assessor — Flags unusual or risky clauses with severity scoring
Compliance Checker — Validates against GDPR, SOC2, and industry standards
Summary Generator — Creates negotiation briefs and redline summaries

projects.name: HR Operations
projects.description: Resume screening, candidate scoring, personalized outreach, onboarding package generation, and compliance tracking. Multi-agent system for HR teams and recruiters.
agents_list: Resume Screener — Parses resumes, extracts skills, ranks candidates
Candidate Scorer — Evaluates fit using customizable scoring criteria
Outreach Agent — Generates personalized outreach messages per candidate
Onboarding Agent — Creates onboarding packages and compliance checklists

projects.name: AI Agent Sandbox & Governance
projects.description: Open-source governance layer for AI agents — defines permission boundaries, sandboxes execution, and audits every tool call. YAML-defined policies, REST API, tamper-proof audit logs.
agents_list: Policy Engine — Enforce YAML-defined permission policies (filesystem, network, commands)
Sandbox Runner — Execute agent actions within defined boundaries
Audit Logger — Tamper-proof audit trail with hash chain verification
API Server — REST API for CI/CD pipeline integration

Risk Checker — Flag compliance risks and missing requirements
Status Tracker — Monitor application status and deadlines
Report Generator — Create compliance reports and summaries

projects.name: AI App Store Screenshot Generator
projects.description: Automatically generate 800+ localized App Store and Google Play screenshots from a single design template. AI-powered localization across 39+ languages, 3 device sizes, and custom brand kits. Export directly to App Store Connect and Play Console.

Localization Agent — AI-powered translation across 39+ languages with context awareness
Export Agent — Renders screenshots at all device sizes and uploads to stores
QA Agent — Validates screenshots against platform guidelines and brand consistency

projects.name: AI Team That Finds Leads & Writes Outreach

Decision maker identification with role mapping

projects.name: AI Invoice Reconciliation Agent

Discrepancy Detector — Flags price mismatches, missing items, duplicates

projects.name: MCP Server for Google Ads, Meta Ads & GA4

projects.name: ReportGenie AI
projects.description: Automated multi-source report generation with AI-powered insights. Connect Stripe, HubSpot, Google Analytics, Jira, CSV, PostgreSQL, MySQL and generate executive reports with narrative insights and actionable recommendations.
features: Multi-source data connectors (Stripe, HubSpot, GA, Jira, CSV, API)
Executive summary, financial, marketing, engineering templates
Dark-themed dashboard with real-time report generation
REST API with async FastAPI backend

projects.name: NanoEuler — GPT-2 Scale Model in Pure C/CUDA
projects.description: Open-source GPT-2 scale language model implemented from scratch in pure C and CUDA. Train and inference without heavy frameworks — minimal dependencies, maximum performance.
features: Pure C/CUDA implementation — no PyTorch/TensorFlow dependencies
GPT-2 architecture from scratch with multi-head attention
Custom CUDA kernels for matrix operations
Training pipeline with data loading and checkpointing

projects.name: CodeShield SAST

Risk Scorer — Calculates 0-100 risk score weighted by severity
Remediation Advisor — Provides fix guidance for every finding
Scan Orchestrator — Manages scan lifecycle and result persistence

agents_list: Ingest Agent — Event ingestion, validation, and schema normalization
Cohorter Agent — Auto-cohort users by behavior, acquisition, features

projects.name: ComplyAI
projects.description: Enterprise-grade compliance automation for SMBs. AI-powered GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC2 assessments, document analysis, risk scoring, and remediation tracking — built for businesses with 5-200 employees that can't afford enterprise compliance tools.

login
and JWT token management

risk heatmaps

projects.name: OpenComply
projects.description: Open-source SOC 2 / GRC compliance automation platform -- a multi-agent alternative to Vanta, Drata, and Secureframe that automates evidence collection, control mapping, risk assessment, and audit preparation
agents_list: EvidenceCollectorAgent — Automates cloud infrastructure evidence collection from AWS GCP GitHub and Docker
ControlMapperAgent — Maps raw evidence to SOC 2 ISO 27001 and PCI control frameworks

PDF report generation for executive summaries and audit packages

projects.name: Obsidian -- Open-Source Multi-Agent Observability & APM Platform
projects.description: Open-source alternative to Datadog/New Relic powered by a multi-agent AI engine for intelligent root cause analysis, anomaly detection, and alert correlation. Ingest traces, metrics, and logs via OpenTelemetry with ClickHouse storage and a real-time React dashboard.
agents_list: Anomaly Detection Agent — Identifies metric outliers and unusual patterns in real-time using statistical analysis
Trace Analysis Agent — Analyzes distributed trace waterfalls to detect latency issues and error propagation
Log Pattern Agent — Detects error clusters and log volume anomalies across services
Alert Correlation Agent — Deduplicates and groups related alerts into cohesive incidents
Root Cause Agent — Coordinates findings from all agents and produces actionable RCA reports
projects.monetization: Free open-source repo + managed cloud hosted option
key_features: Multi-agent AI engine with 5 specialized agents
ClickHouse columnar storage for high-performance queries
Real-time React dashboard with WebSocket updates
Kubernetes Helm charts for production scaling

Zoom
or Teams integration

topics
objections
competitor mentions using LLM

projects.name: AutoWorkflow Orchestrator

Features 5 LangGraph agents for order intake, change management, product lifecycle, device lifecycle, and cross-system consistency monitoring. Includes enterprise dashboard and GDPR compliance layer.

Product Lifecycle Agent — Engineering change management with impact analysis

Compliance Guard Agent — GDPR compliance, consent management, data mapping, DSR handling
projects.monetization: Free repo + 3K-10K enterprise setup with custom agent configuration and ERP integration
key_features: Multi-channel order ingestion and ERP routing
Change request management with approval workflows

projects.name: Smart Europe AI Agent
projects.description: LangGraph-powered multi-agent customer support system for Smart Europe automotive. 6 specialized agents (Router, KB RAG, Clarification, SIM Lifecycle, Order Mgmt, Escalation) + 5 n8n automation workflows (Order Ingestion, Outlet Changes, Product/PNO18, SIM Lifecycle via Vodafone IoT, Data Consistency). GDPR-compliant with eu-central-1 data residency. Self-hosted n8n replaces SAP CPI Groovy scripts. Runs on AWS Bedrock (Claude Sonnet).
agents_list: Router Agent — Classifies user intent and routes to correct handler using Bedrock Claude Sonnet

orders
products)
SIM Lifecycle Agent — Manages eSIM activation/deactivation/pairing via n8n → Vodafone IoT API
Order Agent — Handles order status inquiries and modifications via n8n
Human Escalation Agent — GDPR Art. 22 compliant handoff to Smart Europe specialists
projects.monetization: Enterprise delivery via IntelligenzIT — 2 Digital FTEs + n8n automation layer

RAG with AWS Bedrock Knowledge Bases
SIM lifecycle via Vodafone IoT API integration
